items.name_en: (Prada) Moon/Crescent Bag Fashion Dark Horse[Victory] Calfskin with scattered letter gold hardware, deer pattern paired with fashion crocodile🐊pattern, more stylish. The crescent shape has a self-adjusting buckle, overall leather chain, can be sweet or salty. Shows elegance with a touch of retro. Side buckles can instantly turn it into a cute hula hoop, unlocking multi-use.

items.name_en: 【Highest Version Original Factory Leather Top-tier Original with Full Counter Packaging】 🎉 Prada New Nylon Hobo Handbag/Crossbody with Gold Hardware 😘😘 This Hobo bag, which went viral in the fashion circle due to recommendations from influencer groups, has a new design! 👏👏 The design is amazing 👍👍 Multi-functional: waist bag/shoulder bag/crossbody 👍👍 The handle is replaced with a chain, adding a touch of sexiness when used as a shoulder bag. Also comes with a long strap. The best part is the strap has a small charm (mini bag), which can also be used to hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes well with any outfit 😘😘 Hurry up and get one, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: 22x12x6cm

items.name_en: 【Top Grade】🎉New Three-in-One🎉1B is here👏 This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with the iconic engraved logo embellishing the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic closure design remains classic, and the woven strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, paired with a small coin purse for versatile functionality and use as a clutch😘😘 The soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a detachable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple and stylish, ladies hurry up and get one🎉🎉🎉👏
